name: memory-reading
description: Recommend what to read next from relevant user memory, current goals, and verified book evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Recommend the right book for what matters now.
interface.longDescription: Uses only relevant user context and available memory, verifies real book information, and recommends the next book with a transparent why-now rationale.
defaultPrompt: 根据你对我的相关记忆，推荐我现在最值得读的一本书。
结合我最近反复遇到的问题，推荐下一本书并解释为什么是现在。
从我的目标和阅读历史出发，给我一个稳妥选择和一个探索选择。
